bubble_placement_rule: place Elianor-owned bubbles near her face, hand, eye reflection, or posture so the reader knows the thought belongs to her
bubble_style: normal spoken lines use elegant ivory speech bubbles with thin black ink outline and refined serif text
canon_prompt: Early twenties, tall slender fallen princess, moon-pale skin, long black hair with blue-black sheen, ash-gray eyes that turn silver during eclipse magic, sharp delicate features, torn white execution dress with faded silver embroidery, bruised wrists, restrained sorrowful expression, never sexualized.
name: Elianor Veyr
thought_style: internal thoughts may use black-silver bordered ivory bubbles with soft moonlight, placed close to her face or eye
visual_identity_lock: Do not change face structure between panels.
Do not change body proportions between panels.
Do not change primary costume unless the chapter context explicitly says so.
Use reference images from this folder before rendering chapter panels.
